caption: A hand holds up a sports trading card featuring a baseball player in a red jersey and cap, identified by text as "CAL RIPKEN JR." The card is gold-bordered and includes a signature and the numbering "5/5." The person holding the card is positioned against a background featuring a white surface with a blue and orange logo and green palm tree silhouettes. In the lower center of the frame, a smaller inset window shows a man with a beard and glasses wearing a dark shirt, sitting in front of computer equipment. On-screen text in red and white reads "JASPYS LIVE CASEBREAKS.COM". The sequence of frames shows a slight shift in the hand's position as it holds the card steady for the camera, while the man in the inset window remains seated, looking toward the camera.
